Findings.Title: Virtual network does not have DDoS Protection Plan enabled
Findings.Detail: Virtual network vnet-prod does not have an Azure DDoS Protection Plan associated. DDoS Protection Standard provides enhanced mitigation for virtual network resources.
Findings.Remediation: Associate an Azure DDoS Protection Plan with the virtual network.

Findings.Title: VM does not use managed identity
Findings.Detail: Virtual machine vm-db-01 does not have a system-assigned or user-assigned managed identity. Managed identities eliminate the need for credentials in code.
Findings.Remediation: Enable system-assigned managed identity on the VM or assign a user-assigned managed identity.

Findings.Title: AKS cluster has RBAC enabled
Findings.Detail: AKS cluster aks-prod-01 has Kubernetes RBAC enabled, providing fine-grained access control.
